description:
You are a GIS Technologist setting up a multi-department GeoServer deployment. The Natural Earth data team needs their own isolated WFS (Web Feature Service) endpoint with controlled feature download limits. Configure workspace-specific WFS service settings for the 'ne' workspace with the following parameters:

- Title: Natural Earth Feature Service
- Abstract: Provides controlled access to Natural Earth vector datasets
- Max Features: 50
- Service Level: COMPLETE
- Enabled: true

Save the workspace-specific WFS GetCapabilities response to ~/ne_wfs_capabilities.xml and a WFS GetFeature response for the 'ne_countries' layer in JSON format to ~/ne_countries_features.json.

GeoServer URL: http://localhost:8080/geoserver
Credentials: admin / Admin123!

metadata.expected_abstract: Provides controlled access to Natural Earth vector datasets
